records.label: Enemy Corpse ^xE05030Life:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the maximum ^xE05030life ^7of the target corpse for Detonate Dead and similar skills.
For reference, a level 70 monster has

records.label: Time spent stationary
records.tooltip_text: Applies mods that use `while stationary` and `per / every second while stationary`

records.label: Are you always on Low ^x7070FFMana?
records.tooltip_text:
You will automatically be considered to be on Low ^x7070FFMana ^7if you have at least 50% ^x7070FFmana ^7reserved,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Are you always on Full ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
Are you always on Low ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
records.tooltip_text:
You will automatically be considered to be on Low ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield ^7if you have at least 50% ^x88FFFFES ^7reserved,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Are your Minions always on Full ^xE05030Life?
Are your Minions always on Low ^xE05030Life?
Minion is always on Full ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
Have your Minions been created Recently?
Ailment calculation mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how the base damage for applying Ailments is calculated:
	Average: damage is based on the average application, including both crits and non-crits
	Crits Only: damage is based solely on Ailments inflicted with crits

records.label: Random element mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how modifiers which choose a random element will function.
	Average: Modifiers will grant one third of their value to ^xB97123Fire^7, ^x3F6DB3Cold^7, and ^xADAA47Lightning ^7simultaneously
	^xB97123Fire ^7/ ^x3F6DB3Cold ^7/ ^xADAA47Lightning^7: Modifiers will grant their full value as the specified element
If a modifier chooses between just two elements, the full value can only be given as those two elements.

records.label: ^xE05030Life ^7regen calculation mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how ^xE05030life ^7regeneration is calculated:
	Minimum: does not include burst regen
	Average: includes burst regen, averaged based on uptime
	Burst: includes full burst regen

records.label: Resource gain calculation mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how resource on hit/kill is calculated:
	Minimum: does not include chances
	Average: includes chance gains, averaged based on uptime
	Maximum: treats all chances as certain

records.label: EHP calc unlucky:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the EHP calc to pretend its unlucky and reduce the effects of random events such as
	Block/Spell Block Chance
	Dodge/Spell Dodge Chance
	Spell Suppression Chance
	Avoidance Chance

records.label: Disable EHP gain when hit:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the EHP calc to not apply gain on block, suppress or Defiance of Destiny effects

records.label: Armour calculation mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how Defending with Double Armour is calculated:
	Minimum: never Defend with Double Armour
	Average: Damage Reduction from Defending with Double Armour is proportional to chance
	Maximum: always Defend with Double Armour
This setting has no effect if you have 100% chance to Defend with Double Armour.

records.label: Exerted/Boosted calc mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how exerted attacks from Warcries are calculated:
Average: Averages out Warcry usage with cast time, attack speed and warcry cooldown.
Max Hit: Shows maximum hit for lining up all warcries.

records.label: Don't disable items
records.tooltip_text: Ignore the effects of things which disable items, like Bringer of Rain

records.label: Ignore Jewel Limits
records.tooltip_text: Ignore the limits on jewels

records.label: # of Empty ^xE05030Red^7 Sockets
records.tooltip_text:
This option allows you to override the default calculation for the number of Empty ^xE05030Red^7 Sockets.
The default calculation assumes enabled gems in skill socket groups fill the item in socket order disregarding gem colour.
Leave blank for default calculation.

records.label: # of Empty ^x70FF70Green^7 Sockets
records.tooltip_text:
This option allows you to override the default calculation for the number of Empty ^x70FF70Green^7 Sockets.
The default calculation assumes enabled gems in skill socket groups fill the item in socket order disregarding gem colour.
Leave blank for default calculation.

records.label: # of Empty ^x7070FFBlue^7 Sockets
records.tooltip_text:
This option allows you to override the default calculation for the number of Empty ^x7070FFBlue^7 Sockets.
The default calculation assumes enabled gems in skill socket groups fill the item in socket order disregarding gem colour.
Leave blank for default calculation.

records.label: # of Empty White Sockets
records.tooltip_text:
This option allows you to override the default calculation for the number of Empty White Sockets.
The default calculation assumes enabled gems in skill socket groups fill the item in socket order disregarding gem colour.
Leave blank for default calculation.

records.label: Include in ^x7070FFMana ^7spent Recently?
records.tooltip_text:
When enabled, the mana spent by Arcane Cloak used at full mana 
will be added to the value provided in # of ^x7070FFMana ^7spent Recently.

records.label: Banner Valour:
records.tooltip_text: The amount of valour consumed for the placed banner

records.label: # of Bloodsoaked Banner stacks on enemy
Count Skill Reservation towards eHP?
records.tooltip_text: Use this option to disable the skill reservation factoring into eHP calculations

records.label: # of Brands attached to the enemy:
Skill is targeting the Branded enemy

records.tooltip_text: Combat Rush grants 20% more Attack Speed to Travel Skills not Supported by Close Combat.

records.label: # of Corrupting Cry stacks on enemy
Damage % (if not maximum):
records.tooltip_text:
Cruelty is a buff provided by Cruelty Support which grants
up to 40% more damage over time to the skills it supports.

records.label: Skeleton ^xE05030Life:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the maximum ^xE05030Life ^7of the Skeleton that is being targeted.

records.label: Phys as ^xB97123Fire
records.tooltip_text:
Grants your Sentinel Minion as Aura that grants
	Gain 15% of Physical Damage as Extra ^xB97123Fire ^7Damage

records.label: Phys as ^xADAA47Lightning
records.tooltip_text:
Grants your Sentinel Minion as Aura that grants
	Gain 15% of Physical Damage as Extra ^xADAA47Lightning ^7Damage

records.label: Regen ^xE05030Life
records.tooltip_text:
Grants your Sentinel Minion as Aura that grants
	Regenerate 1.5% of ^xE05030Life ^7per second

records.label: ^x7070FFMana ^7Regeneration Rate
records.tooltip_text:
Grants your Sentinel Minion as Aura that grants
	30% increased ^x7070FFMana ^7Regeneration Rate

records.label: ^xD02090Chaos ^7Resistance
records.tooltip_text:

	+23% to ^xD02090Chaos ^7Resistance

records.label: Curse Effect on Self

Grants your Sentinel Minion as Aura that grants
	50% reduced Effect of Curses on you

records.label: Glorious Madness Stacks
records.tooltip_text:
Glorious Madness Stacks grants:
	Eroding Touch: 6% inc Damage Taken per stack
	Paralysing Touch: 6% reduced Action Speed per stack
	Diluting Touch: 9% reduced Flask charges gained and 9% reduced Flask Effect per stack
	Wasting Touch: 9% reduced ^xE05030Life ^7and ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield ^7recovery rate per stack

records.label: Is Feeding Frenzy active?
records.tooltip_text:
Feeding Frenzy grants:
	10% more Minion Damage
	10% increased Minion Movement Speed
	10% increased Minion Attack and Cast Speed

records.label: Is Slipstream active?:
records.tooltip_text:
Greater Harbinger of Time Slipstream buff grants:
10% increased Action Speed
Buff affects the player and allies
Buff has a base duration of 8s with a 10s Cooldown

records.label: Is Slipstream active?:
records.tooltip_text:
Harbinger of Time Slipstream buff grants:
10% increased Action Speed
Buff affects the player, allies and enemies in a small radius
Buff has a base duration of 8s with a 20s Cooldown

records.label: Overkill damage:
records.tooltip_text: Herald of Ash's base ^xB97123Burning ^7damage is equal to 25% of Overkill damage.

records.label: Missing Unreserved ^x7070FFMana^7 %:
records.tooltip_text:
Ignores values outside the 0-100 range, defaults to 100% if not specified. 
A more realistic value would be to match your Arcane Cloak spend %.

records.label: Damageable Minion ^xE05030Life:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the maximum ^xE05030life ^7of the target minion for Minion Pact.

records.label: Enemy has Malignant Madness?
records.tooltip_text:
A debuff that applies:
	Deal 10% less Damage
	10% reduced Action Speed

records.label: Enemy hit by Misty Reflection?
records.tooltip_text:
Misty Reflection debuff lasts 4 seconds and makes enemies have:
	30% increased Damage Taken
	Deal 30% less Damage

records.label: # of Overlapping Spikes:
records.tooltip_text:
Affects the DPS of Perforate in Blood Stance.
Maximum is limited by the number of Spikes of Perforate.

records.label: Is the enemy marked with Signal Prey?
Enable buffs:
records.tooltip_text: Enable any buff skills that your spectres have.

records.label: Enable curses:
records.tooltip_text: Enable any curse skills that your spectres have.

records.label: Blade Vortex blade count:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the blade count for Blade Vortex skills used by spectres.
Default is 1; maximum is 5.

records.label: Sanguimancer Demon not on Low Life:
# of Spiders:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the number of active Spiders.
The base maximum number of Spiders is 20.

records.label: Are you animating Lingering Blades?
records.tooltip_text:
Enables additional damage given to Lingering Blades
The exact weapon is unknown but should be similar to Glass Shank

records.label: # of Shotgunning Projectiles:
records.tooltip_text: Maximum is limited by the number of Projectiles., default of 1, if Arrow nova then default of maximum projectiles

records.label: # of Enemies affected:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the number of enemies affected by Siphoning Trap.

records.label: # of Snipe stages:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the number of stages reached before releasing Snipe.

records.label: # of Active Spectral Tigers:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the number of active Spectral Tigers.
The base maximum number of Spectral Tigers is 5.

records.label: # of Active Spectral Wolves:
records.tooltip_text:
Sets the number of active Spectral Wolves.
The base maximum number of Spectral Wolves is 10.

records.label: Steel Wards:
records.tooltip_text:
Steel Wards are gained from using Shattering Steel of Ammunition with at least 2 Steel Shards.
You can have up to 6 Steel Wards, and each grants +8% chance to Block Projectile Attack Damage.

records.label: # of Weeping Black stacks on enemy:
% chance for second proj to hit:
records.tooltip_text: Override to the percent chance for the secondary projectiles to hit, default of 60% or 80% with helm enchant. (20% per secondary projectile)

records.label: # of Overlapping Pods:
records.tooltip_text: Maximum is limited by the number of Projectiles.

records.label: Lowest Resonance Count:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the amount of resonance on the lowest element.

records.label: Lowest Resonance Count:
records.tooltip_text: Sets the amount of unholy resonance on the lowest element.

records.label: Warcry Power:
records.tooltip_text:
Power determines how strong your Warcry buffs will be, and is based on the total strength of nearby enemies.
Power is assumed to be 20 if your target is a Boss, but you can override it here if necessary.
	Each Normal enemy grants 1 Power
	Each Magic enemy grants 2 Power
	Each Rare enemy grants 10 Power
	Each Unique enemy grants 20 Power

records.label: Absolution: Count skill damage once
records.tooltip_text:
Your Absolution Skill Damage will not be scaled with Count setting.
By default it multiplies both minion count and skill hit count which leads to incorrect
Total DPS calculation since Absolution cannot inherently shotgun.
Do not enable if you use Spell Totem support, Spell Cascade support or similar supports

records.label: Dom. Blow: Count skill damage once
records.tooltip_text:
Your Dominating Blow Skill Damage will not be scaled with Count setting.
By default it multiplies both minion count and skill hit count which leads to incorrect
Total DPS calculation since Dominating Blow cannot inherently shotgun.
Do not enable if you use Spell Totem support, Spell Cascade support or similar supports

records.label: Holy Strike: Count skill damage once
records.tooltip_text:
Your Holy Strike Skill Damage will not be scaled with Count setting.
By default it multiplies both minion count and skill hit count which leads to incorrect
Total DPS calculation since Holy Strike cannot inherently shotgun.

records.label: Damage mitigated:
records.tooltip_text:
Molten Shell reflects damage to the enemy,
based on the amount of damage it has mitigated.

records.label: Damage mitigated:
records.tooltip_text:
Vaal Molten Shell reflects damage to the enemy,
based on the amount of damage it has mitigated in the last second.

records.label: Enemy size preset:
records.tooltip_text:
Configure the radius of an enemy hitbox which is used in calculating some area multi-hitting (shotgunning) effects.

Small sets the radius to 2.
	Most monsters and the players' character are this size.
Medium sets the radius to 3.
	This is the size of most humanoid bosses (i.e. The Maven; The Shaper; Izaro)
Large sets the radius to 5.
	This is the size of some larger bosses (i.e. King Kaom; Vaal Oversoul)
Huge sets the radius to 11.
	This is the size of some of the largest bosses (i.e. Nucleus of the Maven; Tsoagoth, The Brine King)

records.label: Enemy radius:
records.tooltip_text: Configure the radius of an enemy hitbox to calculate some area overlapping (shotgunning) effects.

records.label: Total Spectre Life:
records.tooltip_text: The total life of your Spectres that can be taken before yours (used by jinxed juju)

records.label: Total Totem Life:
records.tooltip_text: The total life of your Totems (excluding Vaal Rejuvenation Totem) that can be taken before yours (used by totem mastery)

records.label: Total life pool of Sentinel of Radiance
Total life pool of Void Spawn
Total Vaal Rejuvenation Totem Life:
records.tooltip_text: The total life of your Vaal Rejuvenation Totems that can be taken before yours

records.tooltip_text: Sets the level of Warlord's Mark to apply to the player.

records.label: # of Gale Force:
records.tooltip_text: Base maximum Gale Force is 10.

records.label: Do you wait for Max Unleash Seals?
Ruthless Support Mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how the hit/ailment effect of Ruthless Support is calculated:
	Average: damage is based on the average application
	Max Effect: damage is based on maximum effect

records.label: Chance To Ignore PDR Mode:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls how the chance on hit to ignore enemy physical damage reduction is calculated:
	Minimum: never ignores unless chance is at least 100%
	Average: damage is based on the average application
	Max Effect: always ignores if you have any chance

records.label: Do your Minions use Power Charges?
Do your Minions use Frenzy Charges?
Do your Minions use Endur. Charges?
# of Rampage Kills:
records.tooltip_text:
Rampage grants the following, up to 1000 stacks:
	1% increased Movement Speed per 20 Rampage
	2% increased Damage per 20 Rampage
You lose Rampage if you do not get a Kill within 5 seconds.

records.label: # of Soul Eater Stacks:
records.tooltip_text:
Soul Eater grants the following, up to a base of 45 stacks:
	5% increased Attack Speed
	5% increased Cast Speed
	1% increased character size per stack.

records.label: # of Minion Soul Eater Stacks:
records.tooltip_text:
Soul Eater grants the following, up to a base of 45 stacks:
	5% increased Attack Speed
	5% increased Cast Speed
	1% increased character size per stack.

records.label: Do you have Onslaught?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing any 'while you have Onslaught' modifiers to apply,
this will enable the Onslaught buff itself. (Grants 20% increased Attack, Cast, and Movement Speed)

records.label: Do you have Arcane Surge?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing any 'while you have Arcane Surge' modifiers to apply,
this will enable the Arcane Surge buff itself. (Grants 20% increased cast speed and 30% increased Mana Regeneration rate)

records.label: Do your minions have Onslaught?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing any 'while your minions have Onslaught' modifiers to apply,
this will enable the Onslaught buff itself. (Grants 20% increased Attack, Cast, and Movement Speed)

records.label: Do you have Unholy Might?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Unholy Might buff.
(Grants 100% of Physical Damage converted to ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage)
(25% chance to apply Wither on Hit)

records.label: Do your minions have Unholy Might?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Unholy Might buff on your minions.
(Grants 100% of Physical Damage converted to ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage)
(25% chance to apply Wither on Hit)

records.label: Do you have Chaotic Might?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Chaotic Might buff.
(Grants 30% of Physical Damage as Extra ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage)

records.label: Do you have Sacrificial Zeal?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Sacrificial Zeal buff.
(Grants 25% of the skill's mana cost as Physical Damage and causes you to take physical damage over time equal to a percentage of the skill's mana cost.)

records.label: Do your minions have Chaotic Might?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Chaotic Might buff on your minions.
(Grants 30% of Physical Damage as Extra ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage)

records.label: # of Fortification Stacks (if not maximum):
records.tooltip_text:
You have 1% less damage taken from hits per stack of fortification:
Has a default cap of 20 stacks.

records.label: Do you have Tailwind?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing any 'while you have Tailwind' modifiers to apply,
this will enable the Tailwind buff itself. (Grants 8% increased Action Speed)

records.label: Do you have Adrenaline?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Adrenaline buff, which grants:
	100% increased Damage
	25% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
	10% additional Physical Damage Reduction

records.label: Changed Stance in the last 1s?
records.tooltip_text: 'Changing Stance' occurs by activating a Stance skill while it's toggled on

records.label: Do you have Alchemist's Genius?

20% increased Flask Charges gained

records.label: Do you have Vaal Arc's Lucky Buff?
records.tooltip_text: Causes Damage with Arc Hits to be rolled twice, and the maximum roll used.

records.label: Are you Elusive?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing any 'while Elusive' modifiers to apply,
this will enable the Elusive buff itself:
	15% Chance to Avoid all Damage from Hits
	30% increased Movement Speed
The effect of Elusive decays over time.

records.label: Effect of Elusive (if not average):
records.tooltip_text:
If you have a guaranteed source of Elusive, the strongest one will apply. 
You can change this to see various buff values

records.label: Do you have Divinity?
records.tooltip_text:
This will enable the Divinity buff, which grants:
	75% more Elemental Damage
	25% less Elemental Damage taken

records.label: ^xFF9922Rage:
records.tooltip_text:
Base Maximum ^xFF9922Rage ^7is 30, and inherently grants 1% More Attack Damage per 1 ^xFF9922Rage^7
You lose 10 ^xFF9922Rage ^7every second if you have not been Hit or gained ^xFF9922Rage ^7in the last 2 seconds.

records.label: Do you have Wild Savagery?
records.tooltip_text:
From Oshabi's Bloodline, grants:
	100% increased Physical Damage
	10% increased Action Speed
	Hits ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction
	Cannot be Stunned

records.label: Are you Leeching?
records.tooltip_text:
You will automatically be considered to be Leeching if you have '^xE05030Life ^7Leech effects are not removed at Full ^xE05030Life^7',
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Do you have a Flask active?
records.tooltip_text:
This is automatically enabled if you have a flask active,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Do you have a Tincture active?
records.tooltip_text:
This is automatically enabled if you have a tincture active,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Mana Burn Stacks:

Mana Burn Applies a 1% of mana degen per stack
This also applies Weeping Wounds if the Keystone is Allocated

but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Melee distance to enemy:
records.tooltip_text: 10 units equals 1 metre

records.label: Projectile travel distance:
records.tooltip_text: 10 units equals 1 metre

records.label: Is the enemy at Close Range?
Enemy in Your Presence Duration
records.tooltip_text: Number of seconds the enemy has been in your presence.

records.label: Is the enemy Cursed?
records.tooltip_text:
The enemy will automatically be considered to be Cursed if you have at least one curse enabled,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Bleed Stack Potential override:
records.tooltip_text:
Allows you to manually set the Stack Potential value for a skill.
Stack Potential equates to the number of times you are able to inflict a Bleed on an enemy before the duration of your first Bleed expires

records.label: Cap to Single Bleed on enemy?
records.tooltip_text: This is for Blood Sap Tincture, but will limit you to only applying a single Bleed on the enemy

records.label: # of Rupture stacks?
records.tooltip_text: Rupture applies more bleed damage and faster bleeds for 3 seconds, up to 4 stacks

records.label: Is the enemy non-Poisoned?
records.tooltip_text:
This is for low tolerance, but will limit you to only applying poison a single time
^8(Note that you can still apply multiple stacks via 'inflict additional poison' mods)^7

records.label: # of Withered Stacks:
records.tooltip_text: Withered applies 6% increased ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage Taken to the enemy, up to 15 stacks.

records.label: # of Corrosion Stacks:
records.tooltip_text:
Each stack of Corrosion applies -5000 to total Armour and -1000 to total ^x33FF77Evasion Rating ^7to the enemy.
Corrosion lasts 4 seconds and refreshes the duration of existing Corrosion stacks
Corrosion has no stack limit

records.label: # of Ensnare Stacks:
records.tooltip_text:
While ensnared, enemies take increased Projectile Damage from Attack Hits
Ensnared enemies always count as moving, and have less movement speed while trying to break the snare.

records.label: Is the enemy Excommunicated?
records.tooltip_text: Excommunicated Enemies cannot deal ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage.

records.label: Is the enemy Blinded?
records.tooltip_text:
In addition to allowing 'against Blinded Enemies' modifiers to apply,
 Blind applies the following effects.
 -20% Accuracy 
 -20% ^x33FF77Evasion

records.label: Effect of Blind (if not maximum):
records.tooltip_text: If you have a guaranteed source of Blind, the strongest one will apply.

records.label: Is the enemy Debilitated?
records.tooltip_text: Debilitated enemies deal 10% less damage.

records.label: Is the enemy Pacified?
records.tooltip_text: Enemies are Pacified after 60% of Pacify's duration has expired

records.label: Is the enemy ^xB97123Ignited?

Mania Stacks apply:

	2% reduced Action Speed per stack
	10% reduced ^xE05030Life ^7and ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield ^7Recovery Rate per stack

records.label: Enemy Level:
records.tooltip_text:
This overrides the default enemy level used to estimate your hit and ^x33FF77evade ^7chance.

The default level for normal enemies and standard bosses is 83.
Their default level is capped by your character level.

The default level for pinnacle bosses is 84, and the default level for uber pinnacle bosses is 85.
Their default level is not capped by your character level.

records.label: Is the enemy Rare or Unique?
records.tooltip_text:
The enemy will automatically be considered to be Unique if they are a Boss,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

records.label: Delirious Effect:
records.tooltip_text:
Delirium scales enemy 'less Damage Taken' as well as enemy 'increased Damage dealt'
At 100% effect:
Enemies Deal 30% Increased Damage
Enemies take 80% Less Damage

records.label: Enemy Max Resistance is always 75%
records.tooltip_text:
Enemy Maximum resistance is increased by the resistance configurations 
This locks it at the default value

records.label: Enemy Skill Roll Range %:
records.tooltip_text:
The percentage of the roll range the enemy hits for 
 eg at 100% the enemy deals its maximum damage

records.label: Enemy Damage Type:
records.tooltip_text:
Controls which types of damage the EHP calculation uses:
	Average: uses the Average of all typed damage types (except Damage Over Time and Untyped)

If a specific damage type is selected, that will be the only type used.

records.label: Enemy attack / cast time in ms:
Custom PvP Damage multiplier percent:
records.tooltip_text: This multiplies the damage of a given skill in pvp, for instance any with damage multiplier specific to pvp (from skill or support or item like sire of shards)

records.label: Enemy Skill Physical Damage:
records.tooltip_text:
This overrides the default damage amount used to estimate your damage reduction from armour.
The default is 1.5 times the enemy's base damage, which is the same value
used in-game to calculate the estimate shown on the character sheet.
